title: [InstCombine][MemProf] Preserve all metadata

tests.test_body:
define void @size_returning_aligned_update_test() {
  %call = call { ptr, i64 } @__size_returning_new_aligned_hot_cold(i64 10, i64 8, i8 7) #0
  %p = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %call, 0
  call void @dummy(ptr %p)
  %call1 = call { ptr, i64 } @__size_returning_new_aligned_hot_cold(i64 10, i64 8, i8 7) #1
  %p1 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %call1, 0
  call void @dummy(ptr %p1)
  %call2 = call { ptr, i64 } @__size_returning_new_aligned_hot_cold(i64 10, i64 8, i8 7) #2
  %p2 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %call2, 0
  call void @dummy(ptr %p2)
  %call4 = call { ptr, i64 } @__size_returning_new_aligned_hot_cold(i64 10, i64 8, i8 7) #3
  %p4 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %call4, 0
  call void @dummy(ptr %p4)
  %call3 = call { ptr, i64 } @__size_returning_new_aligned_hot_cold(i64 10, i64 8, i8 7) #4
  %p3 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %call3, 0
  call void @dummy(ptr %p3)
  ret void
}
tests.source_program:
define void @size_returning_aligned_update_test() {
  %call = call { ptr, i64 } @__size_returning_new_aligned_hot_cold(i64 10, i64 8, i8 7) #0
  %p = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %call, 0
  call void @dummy(ptr %p)
  %call1 = call { ptr, i64 } @__size_returning_new_aligned_hot_cold(i64 10, i64 8, i8 7) #1
  %p1 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %call1, 0
  call void @dummy(ptr %p1)
  %call2 = call { ptr, i64 } @__size_returning_new_aligned_hot_cold(i64 10, i64 8, i8 7) #2
  %p2 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %call2, 0
  call void @dummy(ptr %p2)
  %call4 = call { ptr, i64 } @__size_returning_new_aligned_hot_cold(i64 10, i64 8, i8 7) #3
  %p4 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %call4, 0
  call void @dummy(ptr %p4)
  %call3 = call { ptr, i64 } @__size_returning_new_aligned_hot_cold(i64 10, i64 8, i8 7) #4
  %p3 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %call3, 0
  call void @dummy(ptr %p3)
  ret void
}
